transcript: Speaker A: Reels dekhte dekhte time noshto korchen? Apnake ekta secret tip bolchi, shunun. Apnar life set hoye jabe. Interview clear hoye jabe. Job-e promotion paben. Apnar byabshateo bhalo taka uparjon korbe. Ei sob kichu pete hole English khubi important. English bhalo kore kotha bola khubi easy. Shudhu MySivi app-ta install korun. Ekhane AI teacher thakbe, apni Banglay proshno korte parben, aar AI apnake English-e bujhiye debe. Roj matro 15 minute-i jothesto. Ek masher modhye apni-i obak hoye jaben. Ei sob kichu matro ek takay. Ekhuni MySivi app install korun, deri korben na. [Are you wasting time watching reels? Let me tell you a secret tip, listen. Your life will be set. Interviews will be cleared. You'll get a promotion at your job. You'll also earn good money in your business. To get all of this, English is very important. Speaking English well is very easy. Just install the MySivi app. There will be an AI teacher here, you can ask questions in Bengali, and the AI will explain it to you in English. Just 15 minutes a day is enough. Within a month, you yourself will be surprised. All of this for just 1 rupee. Install the MySivi app now, don't delay.]

summary: A young woman urges viewers to stop wasting time on social media reels and instead learn English to boost their careers and businesses. She introduces the MySivi app, highlighting its AI teacher that translates Bengali queries into English. The ad concludes with a promotional offer of a 3-day trial for just 1 rupee.
